Security: Fix critical vulnerabilities (XSS, Firestore rules, input validation)

- Firestore rules: restrict writes to admin-only via isAdmin() check
- Remove window._fbModules/window.firebase global exposure
- Add escapeHtml() to prevent XSS in innerHTML rendering
- Add sanitizeUrl() to block javascript:/data: URL injection
- Add input validation on center submission form

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch to mammoth HTML parsing for full content preservation Root cause: mammoth.extractRawText() merged headings, descriptions, and metadata into single lines, causing content loss during text-to-HTML conversion. Now using mammoth.convertToHtml() which preserves all

, , ,

    /
  • , and tags. Changes: - parse-sections.ts: new parseSectionsFromHtml() extracts sections from mammoth HTML output, strips design-reference markers with HTML-aware regex (preserving surrounding tags) - parse/route.ts: uses mammoth.convertToHtml() instead of extractRawText - Sections now carry contentHtml (rich HTML) from the server - Removed client-side cleanContent/textToHtml — no longer needed - Tiptap editor receives proper HTML directly: bold titles, full paragraphs, bullet lists all render correctly - No content limits or truncation anywhere in the pipeline Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context)

Replace contentEditable with Tiptap rich text editor

- Install @tiptap/react, @tiptap/starter-kit, @tiptap/extension-underline
- CanvasItem now stores contentHtml (HTML) instead of plain text
- Tiptap editor renders content in both read-only and edit modes
  ensuring full content is always visible with no truncation
- H2 headings (first title) and H3 (subsequent titles) properly
  rendered from document structure
- Toolbar buttons show active state (highlighted when format is on)
- Save persists HTML directly to canvas state — changes reflect
  immediately with no conversion loss
- HTML converted to plain text only when sending to stitch API
- Long paragraphs split at sentence boundaries for readability

commit.message:
feat(taro): multi-message comprehensive reading for TTS support

Last card triggers 5-part detailed explanation:
1. ReadingSummary (8-12 sentences + 3-4 advice)
2. OracleMessage: revisit first card in context of whole story
3. OracleMessage: connect middle cards to narrative
4. OracleMessage: tie final cards to seeker's question
5. OracleMessage: warm personal closing

Multiple messages = natural TTS pacing, not one text dump.

commit.message:
ci: auto-release on every push to main

Adds auto-release.yml workflow that triggers on every push to main,
computes the next patch version from the latest tag, and creates+pushes
an annotated tag — which in turn triggers the existing release.yml to
build and publish zips, installer, and Docker image automatically.

commit.message:
Add ScrollState virtual scrolling infrastructure

New `scroll` module providing composable scroll offset tracking, visible
range calculation, and scrollbar rendering support. Components embed a
ScrollState in their state to gain virtual scrolling — rendering only
the visible portion of their content instead of O(n) per frame.

Two usage patterns supported:
- Offset mode: scroll_up/down/page_up/page_down for log viewers and
  text displays
- Selection mode: ensure_visible(index) for lists and tables that
  track a selected item

Includes:
- ScrollState struct with full API (offset, content_length,
  viewport_height, visible_range, ensure_visible, can_scroll, etc.)
- render_scrollbar() and render_scrollbar_inside_border() helpers
  using ratatui's Scrollbar widget
- Serialization support behind feature flag
- 63 unit tests covering all operations and edge cases
- 7 doc tests including module-level examples

fix: nm-report rate limit — 7с между запросами + retry 3x при WBApiError

Проблема: batch 3 из 3 попадал в WB rate limit (3 req/20 sec),
WBApiError молча проглатывался через continue без лога.
Результат: 20 из 41 SKU = 0 переходов.

Решение:
- Заменил request_count % 3 на time-based rate limit (7с между запросами)
- Добавил retry 3 попытки с паузой 25с при WBApiError
- Добавил logging при каждом fail

commit.message:
feat: add competition_nudge hook to push agents toward challenges/alliances

New post-hook that fires every 5 minutes after an agent has 2+ experiments.
If the agent hasn't issued any challenges or proposed alliances, prints a
nudge to stderr with a concrete suggested command (target agent + metric).
Enabled via [hooks] competition_nudge = true in arena.toml.

fix: SRS 학습 로직 전면 수정 + 레벨 시스템 리밸런싱

학습 로직 (25개 버그 수정):
- SRS 일일 신규 카드 카운트 오류 수정 (prev_srs_status RPC 도입)
- Undo 시 SrsQueueManager/CrammingManager 스냅샷 복원
- 구독 덱 카드 진행 기록 없을 때 new 기본값 반환
- 카드 적을 때 requeue gap 무효화 방지
- 모바일 cramming 스와이프/파라미터/currentCard 수정
- SRS 알고리즘 방어 로직 (capGrowth, ease clamp, hard 상태)
- endSession 중복 호출 방지 (sessionSaved flag)
- flipCard isRating 가드 추가
- 마지막 카드 undo 허용 (completed 상태)
- cramming currentCardId() pure peek 변환
- Ctrl+Z 키보드 undo 지원
- 스트릭 grace period (오늘 미학습 시 어제까지 유지)

보안:
- insert_study_log RPC에 auth.uid() + card-deck 소유권 검증
- study_logs RLS append-only (INSERT+SELECT만)
- study_sessions study_mode CHECK 제약 추가

레벨 시스템:
- 듀오링고식 플랫 레벨링 (150 XP/레벨, 꾸준한 레벨업)
- DB/Web/Mobile 공식 통일
- 모바일 레벨업 축하 매번 표시 버그 수정
